evidence: main is fifteen commits ahead and one behind latest-alpha-cli
permission, sandbox, skill selection, multi-agent, MCP, code-mode, context, and unified-exec paths matched declared cuestrap surfaces
kept independent from main with no inferred state

supervisorySessionController.summary: Requalify permission and sandbox vocabulary, dynamic instruction and skill behavior, and concurrent tool-event correlation before strengthening supervisory coverage claims.

idiomaticCueWorkbookHarness.summary: Compare MCP and code-mode result envelopes plus environment-instruction context state with the workbook adapter and raw observation contracts.

critical.title: Permission and sandbox contracts require requalification
critical.summary: Upstream permission schemas and sandbox policy changed while CUEstrap closes permission modes and fail-closed decisions over a fixed vocabulary.
critical.localContractImpact: Requalify CUE and Pydantic permission ingress plus phase-sensitive allow and deny policy.

critical.title: Concurrent unified-exec dispatch challenges event correlation
critical.summary: Upstream runs write_stdin concurrently across terminal sessions, changing the execution ordering assumptions around tool dispatch.
critical.localContractImpact: Requalify pending tool_use_id correlation, pre/post ordering, duplicate handling, and quarantine under concurrent terminal activity.

critical.title: Dynamic skill-selection behavior changed
critical.summary: Dynamic skill-selection implementations changed and an implicit-invocation test surface was removed.
critical.localContractImpact: Recheck repository instruction loading, phase policy, and any assumptions about implicit skill invocation.

high.title: MCP and code-mode result surfaces expanded
high.summary: App metadata reads, connector metadata, code-mode tests, RMCP tests, and event mapping changed.
high.localContractImpact: Compare Marimo MCP dispatch and raw result or error interpretation with current upstream envelopes.

high.title: Environment instructions entered context world state
high.summary: Environment instructions are represented in world state and context history alongside related session changes.
high.localContractImpact: Compare session continuity, context persistence, compaction, and workbook-controller boundaries.

notes.title: Multi-agent lifecycle remains an explicit future boundary
notes.summary: Agent roles, jobs, spawn handling, and notifications changed while the current controller binds a single session and turn attempt.
notes.localContractImpact: Retain multi-agent ownership and run or attempt boundaries as unsupported until explicitly designed.

notes.title: Main and alpha require independent qualification
notes.summary: Main is fifteen commits ahead and one behind alpha at the bootstrap snapshot.
notes.localContractImpact: Do not infer support for one channel from observations of the other.
